prompt: I have a Rete.js editor working with basic nodes. Now I want to add: 1) a right-click context menu where users can add 'Filter', 'Transform', and 'Output' nodes from two categories ('Data' and 'Sink'), 2) a minimap in the corner, 3) undo/redo with Ctrl+Z / Ctrl+Y. How do I add all three features?

assertions.text: AreaExtra type includes ContextMenuExtra in the union
AreaExtra type includes MinimapExtra in the union
render.addPreset(Presets.contextMenu.setup()) is called to register context menu rendering
Uses HistoryExtensions.keyboard(history) for keybindings rather than a manual addEventListener
Context menu uses correct nested category format with 'Data' and 'Sink' subcategories
